creator: arun@sharmas.dhs.org
text:
On Fri, Aug 17, 2001 at 10:37:31AM -0700, will@FreeBSD.org wrote:
> Hey, I'm really sorry I haven't gotten to this PR yet, but if you
> could send me an updated patch for kdeutils 2.2 and *test* it,
> I will do everything in my power to make sure it gets in 2.2.1,
> and be part of FreeBSD 4.4.
> 
> http://www.FreeBSD.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=28475

Will, I don't have the bandwidth or the cpu power to rebuild kde-2.2.
However, since the patch is a *really* simple one - substitute 
0xffff with -1 in the file in question, I think it's safe to make that
change in kde-2.2, if not already done (I sent it to the author too,
but didn't hear back).

Once the binaries are built, I'll be happy to install them on my
laptop and test them for you.

	-Arun
